title: Bridge Essay: Effect of meditation on psychological distress and brain functioning: A randomiz

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** (Phase 8) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Formless/Absorption to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Effect of meditation on psychological distress and brain functioning: Arandomized controlled study.** — Brain Cogn. PMID: 29936408. DOI: 10.1016/j.bandc.2018.03.011. Psychological stability and brain integration are important factors related to physical and mental health and organization effectiveness. This study tested whether amind-body technique, the Transcendental Meditation (TM) program could increase EEG brain integration and positive affect, and decrease psychological distress in government employees.
